title: primula officinalis subsp. tommasinii
intro: Primula officinalis subsp. tommasinii, also known as Tommasini's primrose, is a subspecies of Primula officinalis, a type of flowering plant in the primrose family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, thanks to its expectorant and mucolytic properties. Primula officinalis subsp. tommasinii can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal remedies, such as tinctures and salves, to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
